creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seems that the file size has changed, it this ok?

=> wmconfig-1.4.7.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.

fetch: https://www.arrishq.net/files/wmconfig-1.4.7.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 247548, actual 247865
